package.name: follow_the_gap_v0
package.description: Legacy CTU Follow-The-Gap implementation ported to ROS 2. This package now supports two input modes: - scan: subscribe to LaserScan (recommended for MXCK) - obstacles: subscribe to obstacle_msgs/ObstaclesStamped (legacy compatibility)
package.author: Anders Solberg Pedersen
Jaroslav Klapálek
